Bars: zero MISMATCH and zero map degradations on the full path; on the degraded path (variables response absent — the endpoint is Enterprise-only) the proposal must stay schema-valid, surface raw values as named UNBOUND entries with nearest-token candidates, and fabricate nothing.

### Badge — CANVAS-ABSENT (4) — declared fidelity limits

- `semantics` — element/role are not drawn on the canvas ({"element":"span","role":"status"})
- `a11y` — accessibility requirements are not canvas-recoverable
- `text root font-weight (effective)` — {font.control.weight} resolves to the runtime text default (Medium) — canvas-indistinguishable from no weight token
- `text root font-family (effective)` — {font.control.family} — the canvas renders Inter regardless (documented fidelity scope)

### Card — CANVAS-ABSENT (14) — declared fidelity limits

- `semantics` — element/role are not drawn on the canvas ({"element":"article"})
- `a11y` — accessibility requirements are not canvas-recoverable
- `prop title required` — requiredness is not drawn on the canvas
- `part root/header element` — host element ("header") is not drawn on the canvas

- `part root/body slot required` — slot requiredness is not drawn on the canvas
- `part root/footer element` — host element ("footer") is not drawn on the canvas

- `text root/header/title font-family (effective)` — {font.control.family} — the canvas renders Inter regardless (documented fidelity scope)
- `part root/body color` — {color.surface.foreground} — text-cascade token with no bound text node beneath it on the canvas
- `part root/body font-family` — {font.control.family} — text-cascade token with no bound text node beneath it on the canvas
- `part root/body font-size` — {font.control.size.sm} — text-cascade token with no bound text node beneath it on the canvas
